descriptions.text: Taking place directly after the events of Quest - The Adventure for the 6 Stones in the year 2036, the Wooden Knight and his friends, Alex and Brian, discover that the six legendary stones have to be recharged due to not being used in a very long time. This takes them to a region of Light Island called the Solar Region, where they have to find six ancient temples that can bring back the power of the stones. Along the way, they meet new friends and new foes, as well as beings that were around during the time of the Hero of the Past.
